title: rhododendron polytrichum
intro: Rhododendron polytrichum, also known as the Rosebay or Polytrichum rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits associated with Rhododendron polytrichum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Rhododendron polytrichum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in the production of tinctures and salves.
